# Simple CAPI

> Simple CAPI launches isolated Meta Conversions API endpoints for agencies and client accounts.

## Product

- Creates one isolated CAPI endpoint per client and Meta dataset.
- Keeps Meta access tokens in server-side environment variables.
- Supports browser and server Lead and Schedule event deduplication.
- Provides direct form tracking and optional GoHighLevel webhook mapping.

## Canonical site

- [Simple CAPI](https://simplecapi.com/): Official product homepage.
